jobs.title: GenAI Lead
jobs.matchReason: Your deep expertise in machine learning and NLP, combined with your proven track record of leading data science teams, makes you an ideal candidate. Your experience with LLM frameworks and prompt engineering directly matches this role's core requirements.
jobs.summary: We are seeking a seasoned GenAI Lead to spearhead the development and deployment of generative AI solutions across Global Wealth Management. The ideal candidate brings 8+ years of experience in machine learning, with deep expertise in large language models, prompt engineering, and responsible AI practices. You will lead a cross-functional team of data scientists and engineers to deliver production-grade AI capabilities that transform how financial advisors serve clients.
jobs.yourRole: As our GenAI Lead you will define the strategic roadmap for generative AI adoption within GWM. You'll architect end-to-end LLM pipelines — from data preparation and fine-tuning through evaluation and deployment — while establishing best practices for prompt engineering and model governance. You will mentor a team of 6-8 data scientists and ML engineers, collaborate closely with product managers and compliance stakeholders, and present progress to senior leadership. Day-to-day you'll be hands-on with prototyping, code reviews, and production incident triage, ensuring our AI solutions meet the highest standards of accuracy, fairness, and security.
requirements: 8+ years of experience in machine learning or data science
Deep hands-on expertise with LLMs (GPT, Claude, LLaMA) and prompt engineering
Proven track record leading ML/AI teams of 5+ people
Strong Python skills and experience with ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain)
Experience deploying models to production at scale (Kubernetes, cloud platforms)
Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities

jobs.title: Engineering Lead - AI
jobs.matchReason: Your strong software engineering background and experience with DevOps practices align well with this role. Your ability to architect scalable solutions and champion best practices will be valuable for building AI operational tools.
jobs.summary: We are looking for an Engineering Lead to drive the development of AI-powered operational tools within our GOTO Technology division. This role combines hands-on software architecture with people leadership, requiring 10+ years of engineering experience and a passion for building reliable, scalable systems. You will own the technical direction for a suite of internal tools that leverage AI to automate and optimize technology operations across the firm.
jobs.yourRole: You will lead a team of 8-10 software engineers building next-generation AI operational tools. Your responsibilities include defining the technical architecture, establishing engineering standards, and driving delivery of quarterly roadmap commitments. You'll work closely with data science teams to integrate ML models into production services, ensure robust CI/CD pipelines, and champion engineering excellence through code reviews, design docs, and tech talks. You'll also partner with product owners to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
requirements: 10+ years of software engineering experience with at least 3 years in a lead role
Strong expertise in Python, Java, or Go with microservices architecture
Experience with DevOps practices (CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform)
Familiarity with ML/AI integration patterns and model serving infrastructure
Proven ability to architect and deliver large-scale distributed systems
Strong communication skills and experience mentoring engineers

jobs.title: Senior Platform Engineer
jobs.matchReason: Your expertise in cloud infrastructure and containerization technologies positions you well for this platform role. Your hands-on experience with Kubernetes and distributed systems matches the team's technical requirements.
jobs.summary: Join our Platform Engineering team to design and operate the foundational infrastructure that powers thousands of applications across the firm. We need a senior engineer with 8+ years of experience in cloud-native technologies, deep Kubernetes expertise, and a passion for developer experience. You will shape the platform strategy that enables engineering teams to build, deploy, and run services reliably at scale.
jobs.yourRole: As a Senior Platform Engineer you will design and build core platform capabilities including container orchestration, service mesh, observability, and developer self-service tooling. You'll drive the adoption of cloud-native patterns across the organization, working with application teams to migrate workloads and optimize performance. You'll contribute to platform architecture decisions, author technical RFCs, and mentor junior engineers. Expect to be hands-on with infrastructure-as-code, Kubernetes operators, and CI/CD platform integrations while also engaging with leadership on strategic platform direction.
requirements: 8+ years of infrastructure or platform engineering experience
Deep expertise with Kubernetes (CKA/CKAD certification preferred)
Strong experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Proficiency in infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi, or Crossplane)
Experience with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog)
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work across teams

jobs.summary: We are hiring a Senior Data Engineer to build and maintain scalable data pipelines that power analytics and reporting across the firm. You will work with petabyte-scale datasets and modern data stack technologies.

requirements: 6+ years of data engineering experience
Strong Python and SQL skills
Experience with Spark, Airflow, or similar ETL frameworks
Cloud platform experience (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Understanding of data modeling and warehousing concepts
Excellent problem-solving and communication skills
